scripts.build: npm run build -w @llm-midi/score-model && npm run build -w @llm-midi/midi-smf && npm run build -w @llm-midi/abc-core && npm run build -w @llm-midi/engine-service && npm run build -w @llm-midi/worker-protocol && npm run build -w llm-midi && npm run build -w llm-midi-worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @llm-midi/score-model && npm run build -w @llm-midi/midi-smf && npm run build -w @llm-midi/abc-core && npm run typecheck -w @llm-midi/engine-service && npm run typecheck -w @llm-midi/worker-protocol && npm run typecheck -w llm-midi && npm run typecheck -w llm-midi-worker
